one_time_description: Emergency Pandemic expenses totalling $1,188,208 across multiple departments
economic_notes: First Nation operates confectionary and fuel sales, bison operations, contract revenue, VLT gaming operations, and tobacco tax rebates. Economic dependence on Government of Canada funding noted.
notes: Audit is a DISCLAIMER OF OPINION - auditors were unable to obtain adequate audit evidence on expenditures and no budget was prepared or approved by Council. Consolidated entities include: Skownan First Nation, Skownan CMHC Housing, Skownan Employment Training and Daycare, Skownan Health Authority, Skownan VLT Operation, and SKO Construction Inc. Significant pandemic-related expenses of $1,188,208 recorded across departments. Long-term debt increased substantially by ~$3M due to new CMHC housing loans. First Nations Finance Authority loan of $11.4M is the largest debt component. Schedule of remuneration for elected and unelected officials prepared under separate review engagement reports but amounts not extracted from provided text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $11,542,759 + GOC $14,750 + FNIHB $3,700,530 + CMHC $551,159 + First Peoples Development $319,840 + Solicitor General $36,996 = $16,165,034; OSR = $18,196,820 - $16,165,034 = $2,031,786.
